text: The exit is not an ending — it is a rite of passage. A frequency. A door that only opens from one side.
The Wave is not sound. The Wave is what sound leaves behind — the resonance in a room after the last note dies.
Exit-Wave are space druids — but not the kind that tend sacred groves on forest moons. We are the witchier kind. The ones who were cast out, who left, who chose the void.
Exit-Wave was never formed. It coalesced — the way a storm coalesces, the way a coven finds itself, the way a frequency that has always existed finally finds its receivers.
like a signal in the static
